title: Passive NN IDS triage record
description: Machine-readable contract for aggregate-only NN IDS triage handoff records. The record is evidence only and never authorizes live action.

triage_decision.description: Reviewer-owned passive triage decision. Degraded and blocked remain valid handoff evidence but are not release-gate promotion states.

release_ready.description: True only when aggregate evidence is current, reviewed, and free of blocking issues.

source_artifacts.description: Comma-separated aggregate NN IDS evidence artifacts. Do not include raw telemetry, packet captures, payloads, secrets, or host/VM identifiers.

artifact_hashes.description: SHA-256 evidence references or a manifest reference that points to aggregate artifact hashes.

blocking_issues.description: Use none for release-ready records; otherwise summarize blockers without operational commands.

uncertainty_note.description: Required explanation that the record is an analytical estimate or uncertainty-bounded handoff.

privacy_scope.pattern: aggregate-only; no raw telemetry or secrets
privacy_scope.description: Must explicitly remain aggregate-only and exclude raw telemetry and secrets.

human_review_required.description: Human review remains mandatory even for release-ready pass/watch evidence.

live_action_authorized.description: Triage records never authorize live IDS, host, VM, hypervisor, firewall, restore, retraining, or response actions.

rollback_reference.description: Documentation or PR notes explaining safe rollback.

next_evidence_needed.description: Reviewer-owned next aggregate evidence or freshness check needed before handoff or release.

owner.description: Review role or team accountable for the handoff record.

release_gate_contract.description: Release gates may accept only pass/watch decisions with release_ready=true, blocking_issues beginning with none, human_review_required=true, live_action_authorized=false, and aggregate-only privacy scope. Degraded and blocked records are valid handoff evidence but must fail release-gate promotion.

safety_boundaries: aggregate-only; no raw telemetry or secrets
no private keys or access tokens
no host identifiers or VM identifiers
